title: Diamond Glow Lichen
description: Changes the glow lichen texture to a diamond ore texture to troll your friends or make cursed ores.
body:
This texture pack changes the glow lichen texture to look like diamond ore!

This texture pack is perfect for trolling your friends.

You can also make cursed contraptions.

![Cursed ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f3ca7c2eb8d44ec4dd66e5f54b5c3974606361c.png)

Here is an image of what the ores look like.

![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c454ff9766f015da3457a625dac5e9f12c6c25f.png)

We would appreciate it if you join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/jC6RN6RT4P)!
